## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss AI-led growth community strategy and align on next steps for content and design](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Community needs more active discussions; plan to seed conversations from workshop Q\&As](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Visual identity and design cohesiveness need refinement across platforms](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Content pipeline from workshops to courses to blog posts to be established](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Moderation and curation critical for maintaining high-quality community engagement](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

## Topics

### Community Engagement Strategy

  - [Current community has \~50 paying members, 100 total accounts](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Goal: Increase engagement by seeding discussions from workshop Q\&As](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Plan to invite workshop participants to join relevant community threads](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Consider turning informational content into discussion threads](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2810.0)
  - [Importance of moderation to maintain quality (learned from Exit 5 community)](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2654.0)

### Content Development

  - [Workshops are main content driver, converting to courses and blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Need to establish clearer pipeline: workshop \> course \> blog \> social content](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Aim to create more actionable, domain-specific content from workshop principles](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2898.0)
  - [Considering involving domain experts for specialized AI courses (inspired by other communities)](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)

### Visual Identity and Design

  - [Current site feels "janky" in places, especially the homepage](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
  - [Blog design is strong, but overall cohesiveness needs work](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2085.0)
  - [New thumbnail designs trending in right direction](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1979.0)
  - [Plan to redesign course covers to match new styling](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2209.0)

### Community Platform and Features

  - [Using Circle as the community platform](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2746.0)
  - [Need to enable more discussion features and potentially adjust access settings](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2746.0)
  - [Consider implementing tiered membership structure](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2578.0)

### Events and Content Calendar

  - [Goal to create a more structured roadmap for workshops, podcasts, and community events](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Aim to plan breakfasts and other events further in advance](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1209.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create content roadmap for upcoming months (Claudia & Will)](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2155.0)
  - [Refine visual identity and design cohesiveness across platforms (Ed & team)](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
  - [Set up pipeline for content creation: workshop \> course \> blog \> social (Will & Claudia)](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2155.0)
  - [Seed community discussions using workshop Q\&As and invite participants (Team)](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2810.0)
  - [Explore moderation strategies to maintain high-quality engagement (Team)](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2654.0)
  - [Update course covers to match new styling (Design team)](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2209.0)
  - [Review and potentially adjust community platform settings (Jason & team)](https://fathom.video/share/KkC8WCmLHmPxjpyoXNC6CGKYxiyLXzTS?tab=summary&timestamp=2746.0)
